items.title: Citi Scraps Calls for RBI Hikes as Iran Deal Cools Price Risks
items.desc: Economists at Citigroup Inc. dropped their call for two interest-rate hikes by India’s central bank through March next year, saying an interim US-Iran peace deal has reduced the risk of higher oil prices fueling inflation.
